game_info.title: RED HOT VENGEANCE - Web Edition
game_info.concept:
He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1058640/RED_HOT_VENGEANCE/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed. He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed.
RED HOT VENGEANCE is a twin-stick shooter with a dark and violent storyline.

Main features:
  • 10 level campaign with varying objectives
  • 30 challenge levels
  • New Game+
  • A variety of weapons to customize your loadout
  • Level editor with Steam Workshop support.
  • It's free :)

In the aftermath of blood, smoke, and fire, a mob hitman is reborn as the spirit of pure bloodlust fueled vengeance. There is no time for mercy as you shoot your way through 10 levels of darkness and depravity. Each chapter is connected to the last through hand-drawn, fully voice-acted cutscenes. As you play through the campaign, you will unlock a variety of weapons each with their own behavior to fit your playstyle. Earn medals for completing challenges, find secrets, and wreak vengeance.


RED HOT VENGEANCE features 30 challenge missions. Each challenge is designed to offer a different experience from the campaign, with more experimental level design and objectives. Try to kill all the enemies with only a baseball bat, or survive an onslaught of police until the time runs out. Play the first couple of levels of the campaign to unlock challenges.


RED HOT VENGEANCE features a user-friendly map editor built into the game. Utilizing Steam Workshop, you can create levels and upload them for everyone to play. While the editor doesn't place any arbitrary restrictions on the user, there are guidelines to making a good, functional level. See the guides section of the community hub for a comprehensive guide on making levels.
game_info.description: RED HOT VENGEANCE is a top-down tactical shooter where you play as a hitman seeking revenge. Navigate through procedural levels filled with hostile mobsters. Use cover, manage your ammunition, and utilize a variety of weapons to clear each floor. The game features dynamic lighting, particle-based gore, and intense combat. Your goal is to eliminate all enemies in the level to progress. Watch your health and ammo; carnage awaits.
game_info.controls:
- WASD: Move Character
- Arrow Keys: Shoot (Up, Down, Left, Right - hold two for diagonals)
- Space: Dash / Dodge Roll (Invulnerability frames)
- Z: Swap Weapon (if multiple available)
- Shift: Walk (Slow movement for precision)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Level
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and physics integration.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate WASD inputs for 60 frames each direction. Monitor player position changes in the gameState. Verify velocity is applied and friction stops the player when keys are released.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player coordinates must change according to input vectors. Velocity must be non-zero during input and decay to zero after input ceases.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement and physics integration.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate WASD inputs for 60 frames each direction. Monitor player position changes in the gameState. Verify velocity is applied and friction stops the player when keys are released.
TEST_1.expected: Player coordinates must change according to input vectors. Velocity must be non-zero during input and decay to zero after input ceases.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify weapon firing and projectile spawning mechanism.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Simulate holding the Right Arrow key. Check the gameState.projectiles array count. Ensure projectile velocity vectors align with the shooting direction.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Projectiles should appear in the scene, travel in the positive X direction, and eventually be removed after lifetime expiration.
TEST_2.description: Verify weapon firing and projectile spawning mechanism.
TEST_2.strategy: Simulate holding the Right Arrow key. Check the gameState.projectiles array count. Ensure projectile velocity vectors align with the shooting direction.
TEST_2.expected: Projectiles should appear in the scene, travel in the positive X direction, and eventually be removed after lifetime expiration.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify enemy damage and death logic.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Spawn a static enemy directly in front of the player. Fire weapon until enemy health reaches zero. Monitor enemy list and particle systems.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemy health should decrease on projectile impact. Enemy should be removed from gameState.enemies upon death, and gore particles should spawn.
TEST_3.description: Verify enemy damage and death logic.
TEST_3.strategy: Spawn a static enemy directly in front of the player. Fire weapon until enemy health reaches zero. Monitor enemy list and particle systems.
TEST_3.expected: Enemy health should decrease on projectile impact. Enemy should be removed from gameState.enemies upon death, and gore particles should spawn.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Place player near a wall. Force movement vector into the wall. Check position to ensure player does not clip through.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player position should be clamped or adjusted by the physics resolver, preventing passage through the wall object.
TEST_4.strategy: Place player near a wall. Force movement vector into the wall. Check position to ensure player does not clip through.
TEST_4.expected: Player position should be clamped or adjusted by the physics resolver, preventing passage through the wall object.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Load a test level with 1 enemy. Kill the enemy. Check gameState.gamePhase.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: After the last enemy dies, a level completion timer should start, eventually triggering a "LEVEL_COMPLETE" or next level loading state.
TEST_5.strategy: Load a test level with 1 enemy. Kill the enemy. Check gameState.gamePhase.
TEST_5.expected: After the last enemy dies, a level completion timer should start, eventually triggering a "LEVEL_COMPLETE" or next level loading state.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Place player behind a wall, then move into open view of an enemy. Monitor enemy state/behavior.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Enemy state should switch from IDLE/PATROL to ATTACK when player is visible. Enemy should start firing projectiles.
TEST_6.strategy: Place player behind a wall, then move into open view of an enemy. Monitor enemy state/behavior.
TEST_6.expected: Enemy state should switch from IDLE/PATROL to ATTACK when player is visible. Enemy should start firing projectiles.

TEST_7.test_description: Verify Dash mechanic cooldown and state.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Trigger Dash (Space). Check player "isDashing" flag and cooldown timer.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Player should enter dashing state immediately, move faster, and be unable to dash again until cooldown expires.
TEST_7.description: Verify Dash mechanic cooldown and state.
TEST_7.strategy: Trigger Dash (Space). Check player "isDashing" flag and cooldown timer.
TEST_7.expected: Player should enter dashing state immediately, move faster, and be unable to dash again until cooldown expires.
